name: wuci-ji-site
description: Static Wuci-Ji / Wuci-OS website deployment package.

scripts.preview: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 8788 --directory build/site-dist
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && WRANGLER_WRITE_LOGS=false WRANGLER_SEND_METRICS=false XDG_CONFIG_HOME=${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$HOME/.config} npx wrangler pages deploy build/site-dist --project-name wuci-ji --branch main
